## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- **App Version:** (e.g. 1.0.132+354)
- **OS:** (e.g. iOS 17.4 / Android 14)
- **Device:** (e.g. iPhone 15 / Pixel 8)

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information.
